channel.title: Comments on: Ska Brewing Company: Pinstripe Red Ale, Ep. 152
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Foyle
item.dc:creator: Foyle
item.description: Dump the green screen! It makes your excellent beer reviews almost impossible to watch.
item.content:encoded: Dump the green screen! It makes your excellent beer reviews almost impossible to watch.

item.title: By: Paul
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
Hey Marco,
Thanks for hanging with us! Good comment - we only have a few more if these to post and we won't do it again most likely...just trying to mix it up :)
item.content:encoded:
Hey Marco,

Thanks for hanging with us! Good comment – we only have a few more if these to post and we won’t do it again most likely…just trying to mix it up 🙂

item.title: By: Marco
item.dc:creator: Marco
item.description:
Still watching guys! All the movement behind you is distracting. If I may suggest a still, outdoor scenery would be cool.
Cheers
item.content:encoded:
Still watching guys! All the movement behind you is distracting. If I may suggest a still, outdoor scenery would be cool.

Cheers
